prompt: An energetic comic-style visual: the word 'BOOM!' explodes in orange and yellow, crafted in an action font with explosive outlines, set against a vibrant starburst background complete with speed lines.
prompt_refined: Generate a vibrant, energetic comic book-style visual. The word 'BOOM!', rendered in a bold, action font with dynamic, explosive outlines, is centrally placed. The text itself bursts with bright orange and vivid yellow colors. Behind and radiating outwards from the word is a vibrant starburst background, complete with multiple speed lines extending towards the edges of the frame.
objects: Bold, action font for the word 'BOOM!'
Dynamic, explosive outlines around the word 'BOOM!'
Bright orange color on the word 'BOOM!'
Vivid yellow color on the word 'BOOM!'
Vibrant starburst background behind and radiating outwards from 'BOOM!'
Multiple speed lines extending from the starburst background towards the edges of the frame
